svg.text:
┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ ADVANCED MORPHOLOGICAL OPERATIONS │ └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
GRADIENT = Dilation - Erosion TOP HAT = Original - Opening (Edge detection) (Extract bright features)
▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓ ▓▓▓▓▓▓ · ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓ ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓ ·▓ Extracts ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓ → ░▓▓▓▓▓▓░ → · small bright ▓ ▓ objects ░▓▓▓▓▓▓░
BLACK HAT = Closing - Original SKELETONIZATION (Extract dark features) (Reduce to skeleton)
▓▓ ▓▓▓ ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓ ▓▓ ▓▓▓▓ ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓ ▓▓▓ ▓▓ → · Extracts ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓ → ──┬── · small │ ──┼── dark holes ▓▓│▓▓ ──┴──
